Timestamp-aligned diff between transcripts/ and transcripts_corrected/ (same cue time on each side; line indices can differ). Confidence is heuristic only (string similarity, filler removal, length): it is not LLM judgment. Low = please read both columns; High = likely minor / cleanup edit.

Implementation

Copy JSON / Download JSON include every block where you ticked Implement or changed the right-hand text (edits are never omitted). Implement marks downstream intent (implement: true). Edits autosave to localStorage (v3 key) for this exact page URL. If the right column ever showed the wrong lines after a report refresh, that was stale storage — this version uses stable hunk keys so it should not recur. Opening via file:// vs hosted /compare uses different storage. Use Download JSON often as a backup.
